---
title: "George Richmond"
---

## George Richmond

**Dates:** (1809-1896)

### Description

artist

### Biography

Two portraits by Richmond of CMY exist, one in the NPG, the other a sketch of her head.  He also painted WCY (the picture reproduced in Coleridge <i>Life</i>), Keble (at the behest of Sir William Heathcote) and Mary Ann Moberly.  In Richmond\'s archive in the Royal Academy are some letters about the Keble commission, including one from Heathcote telling Richmond to ignore WCY\'s attempts to interfere with the design.

### Letters

- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan, June 28th1898](../letters/3376_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan.html)
- Letter from June 2nd 1896
- Letter from Decr 2nd [1872]
- Letter from March 10th 1865
- Letter from Febry 14 [1865]
- Letter from March 1st [1854]
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
